prose:
The frontier-orbitals calculation on benzene was performed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The calculation converged SCF cycles (8 cycles) and yielded the following result:
- HOMO energy: -7.04683 eV
- LUMO energy: -0.41575 eV
- HOMO-LUMO gap: 6.63109 eV
The method used was B3LYP/def2-TZVP in PySCF, with an explicit geometric structure taken from the input xyz file.
